'''chathodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plagiarising|plagiarising]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plagiarising|plagiarising]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chathodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæthedheth|chæthedheth]] || [[word:chæthedhej|chæthedhej]] || [[word:chæthedhesh|chæthedhesh]] || [[word:chæthedhe|chæthedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathothodhoth|chathothodhoth]] || [[word:chathothodhoj|chathothodhoj]] || [[word:chathothodhosh|chathothodhosh]] || [[word:chathothodho|chathothodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathodhoth|chathodhoth]] || [[word:chathodhoj|chathodhoj]] || [[word:chathodhosh|chathodhosh]] || [[word:chathodho|chathodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathofdhofth|chathofdhofth]] || [[word:chathofdhofj|chathofdhofj]] || [[word:chathofdhofsh|chathofdhofsh]] || [[word:chathofdhof|chathofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathodhotho|chathodhotho]] || [[word:chathodhojo|chathodhojo]] || [[word:chathodhosho|chathodhosho]] || [[word:chathodhoko|chathodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathodhoth|chathodhoth]] || [[word:chathodhoj|chathodhoj]] || [[word:chathodhosh|chathodhosh]] || [[word:chathodho|chathodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathodhothol|chathodhothol]] || [[word:chathodhojol|chathodhojol]] || [[word:chathodhoshol|chathodhoshol]] || [[word:chathodhokol|chathodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathodhoothotho|chathodhoothotho]] || [[word:chathodhoojojo|chathodhoojojo]] || [[word:chathodhooshosho|chathodhooshosho]] || [[word:chathodhooko|chathodhooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathodhothon|chathodhothon]] || [[word:chathodhojon|chathodhojon]] || [[word:chathodhoshon|chathodhoshon]] || [[word:chathodhokon|chathodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathodhothooro|chathodhothooro]] || [[word:chathodhojooro|chathodhojooro]] || [[word:chathodhoshooro|chathodhoshooro]] || [[word:chathodhokooro|chathodhokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a345f0f}}
